tree.name: Kevin Durant
tree.tradeDescription: Centerpiece of historic 7-team trade: Rockets sent Jalen Green, Dillon Brooks, #10 pick (Khaman Maluach), Daeqwon Plowden and multiple 2nd-rounders to Suns for Durant
tree.note: Two-time Finals MVP joins Houston from Phoenix in first 7-team trade in NBA history

assetsGivenUp.name: Jalen Green
assetsGivenUp.note: 2021 #2 overall pick; sent to Phoenix

assetsGivenUp.name: Dillon Brooks
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 5-team trade: Memphis traded Brooks to Houston. Houston sent Josh Christopher to Memphis, Kenyon Martin Jr. to Clippers, Usman Garuba and TyTy Washington Jr. to Hawks, Patty Mills and picks to Thunder. Houston received Alpha Kaba from Hawks and 2nd round picks from Clippers.
assetsGivenUp.note: Defensive wing acquired from Memphis in 5-team trade; sent to Phoenix in KD deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Christopher
assetsGivenUp.note: 2021 #24 pick (from MIL via P.J. Tucker trade); sent to MEM in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kenyon Martin Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded cash and a 2021 2nd round draft pick (LAL own, Luka Garza) to Sacramento for Kenyon Martin Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from SAC; sent to LAC in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (LAL own)
assetsGivenUp.note: LAL own 2nd; acquired from DET in Christian Wood trade (Nov 24, 2020). Sent to SAC for KMJ.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: Usman Garuba
assetsGivenUp.note: 2021 #23 pick (from POR via Covington trade); sent to ATL in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: TyTy Washington Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Wendell Moore Jr. to Timberwolves for TyTy Washington Jr., a 2025 2nd round draft pick (MIN own, Mohamed Diawara) and a 2027 2nd round draft pick (MIN own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIN for Wendell Moore Jr.; sent to ATL in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Wendell Moore Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Christian Wood to Mavericks for Sterling Brown, Trey Burke, Marquese Chriss, Boban Marjanovic and Wendell Moore Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from DAL in Christian Wood trade; immediately flipped to MIN for TyTy

assetsGivenUp.name: Christian Wood
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart, cash and a 2027 2nd round draft pick (HOU own) to Pistons for Christian Wood, a 2021 2nd round draft pick (LAL own, Luka Garza) and a 2025 1st round draft pick (DET own, Joan Beringer #17)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from DET; later traded to DAL for Moore Jr. and salary filler

assetsGivenUp.name: Trevor Ariza
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Robert Covington to Portland for Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart and a 2021 1st round draft pick (lottery protected, Usman Garuba #23)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pass-through: acquired from POR and immediately flipped to DET

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: MIN traded Covington to HOU; HOU traded Clint Capela and Nene to ATL; HOU traded Gerald Green and 2020 1st (Zeke Nnaji #22) to DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIN in 4-team trade; sent to POR for Ariza, Stewart, and 2021 1st

assetsGivenUp.name: Clint Capela
assetsGivenUp.note: 2014 #25 pick; sent to ATL in 4-team trade for Covington

assetsGivenUp.name: Gerald Green
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as FA; sent to DEN in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#22)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick; sent to DEN in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Nene
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as FA; sent to ATL in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Isaiah Stewart
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Part of same Covington-to-POR trade as Ariza; pass-through to DET
assetsGivenUp.note: Pass-through: acquired from POR and immediately flipped to DET. Cost tracked under Ariza node.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick (HOU own)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick sent to DET

assetsGivenUp.name: Patty Mills
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded a 2024 2nd round draft pick (BRK own, did not convey) to Brooklyn Nets for Patty Mills and a 2028 2nd round draft pick (MIL own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from BKN; immediately sent to OKC in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (BRK own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Did not convey. Sent to BKN for Mills.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#37)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own 2nd round pick; sent to OKC in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (MIN own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIN in TyTy Washington trade (June 24, 2022); sent to ATL in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick (HOU own)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick; sent to ATL in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick (HOU own)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick; sent to OKC in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick (HOU own)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick; sent to OKC in 5-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#10)
assetsGivenUp.note: Rockets' own lottery pick; used by Phoenix to draft Maluach

assetsGivenUp.name: Daeqwon Plowden
assetsGivenUp.note: Two-way player sent to Phoenix

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#31)
assetsGivenUp.note: 2nd round pick sent to Phoenix; used to draft Fleming

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#41)
assetsGivenUp.note: 2nd round pick sent to Phoenix; used to draft Brea

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Phoenix as part of Durant trade package

assetsGivenUp.name: 2032 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Phoenix as part of Durant trade package
